error_signature: Custom Auth credential crashes when updated via API
title: Custom Auth credential update causes UI crash
symptom: After updating a Custom Auth credential via the API, the UI shows it was updated but loses the JSON box, leading to a crash.
applies_when: Updating via PATCH method in API
not_this_if: Using a different method than PATCH
root_cause: The issue arises because the JSON data sent in the API request is not properly formatted. Specifically, the lack of escape characters causes the UI to misinterpret the data structure, resulting in the loss of the JSON box.
fix_steps: Double stringify the JSON data in your API request
Ensure the data structure includes necessary escape characters
agent_instruction: Double stringify the JSON data in your API request to include escape characters.
